top_signals.title: Sequans completes bitcoin treasury unwind, refocuses on IoT semiconductors
top_signals.summary: Sequans said its remaining 658 BTC are now fully unrestricted after completing all convertible debt redemptions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: AI part of another tech layoff as Wix CEO announces 20% workforce cut
top_signals.summary: Israel-based web development company Wix is cutting about 20% of its workforce, CEO Avishai Abrahami said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Panama ready to unveil key audit on First Quantum copper mine
top_signals.summary: Final independent Cobre Panama audit, due Friday, arrives amid renewed anti-mining protests and mounting political pressure.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Odd Lots Is Coming to Hong Kong
Workplace NDA ban may bring Tribunal dispute hike
top_signals.summary: A government proposal to ban the use of non-disclosure agreements in cases of workplace harassment or discrimination may make it harder for disputes to be settled outside of tribunals.  The proposal, ‘Make Work Pay’, which is open for consultation until 8 July and part of the recent overhaul of the Employment Rights Act, would ban [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Sandvik introduces AutoMine Aura with 3D perception system
top_signals.summary: Company says this marks the most significant overhaul of its AutoMine system in two decades.
